ddls:
CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role (e.g., Admin, User, Manager) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the role */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the role was created */,
  "modified_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last modified the role */,
  "modified_date" TEXT /* Date when the role was last modified */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Boolean flag to indicate if the role is active */,
  "inheritance_type" TEXT /* Type of inheritance (e.g., Direct, Hierarchical) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "permissions" (
  "perm_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each permission */,
  "perm_name" TEXT /* Name of the permission (e.g., View, Edit) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of what the permission allows */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the permission */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the permission was created */,
  "modified_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last modified the permission */,
  "modified_date" TEXT /* Date when the permission was last modified */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Boolean flag to indicate if the permission is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("perm_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "objects" (
  "obj_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each object */,
  "obj_name" TEXT /* Name of the object (e.g., Document, Report) */,
  "obj_type" TEXT /* Type of the object (e.g., File, Data) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the object */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the object */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the object was created */,
  "modified_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last modified the object */,
  "modified_date" TEXT /* Date when the object was last modified */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Boolean flag to indicate if the object is active */,
  "owner_role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the role that owns the object */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("obj_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "role_permissions" (
  "role_perm_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each role-permission association */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the role associated with the permission */,
  "perm_id" INTEGER /* ID of the permission assigned to the role */,
  "active_indicator" TEXT /* Indicator showing if the permission is currently active (Y/N) */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the role-permission association */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the role-permission association was created */,
  "modified_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last modified the role-permission association */,
  "modified_date" TEXT /* Date when the role-permission association was last modified */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Boolean flag to indicate if the role-permission association is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_perm_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_role_permissions_perm_id FOREIGN KEY ("perm_id") REFERENCES permissions ("perm_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_role_permissions_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES roles ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "user_role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user-role assignment */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user assigned the role */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the assigned role */,
  "assignment_date" TEXT /* Date the role was assigned */,
  "active_indicator" TEXT /* Indicator showing if the role is currently active (Y/N) */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who assigned the role to the user */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the role was assigned to the user */,
  "modified_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last modified the role assignment */,
  "modified_date" TEXT /* Date when the role assignment was last modified */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Boolean flag to indicate if the role assignment is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_role_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_roles_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES roles ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "role_hierarchies" (
  "hierarchy_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each hierarchy entry */,
  "parent_role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the parent role */,
  "child_role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the child role that inherits from the parent */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the role hierarchy */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the role hierarchy was created */,
  "modified_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last modified the role hierarchy */,
  "modified_date" TEXT /* Date when the role hierarchy was last modified */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Boolean flag to indicate if the role hierarchy is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("hierarchy_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_role_hierarchies_child_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("child_role_id") REFERENCES roles ("role_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_role_hierarchies_parent_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("parent_role_id") REFERENCES roles ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_activity_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each log entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user performing the action */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the role involved in the action */,
  "action" TEXT /* Description of the action performed */,
  "action_date" TEXT /* Date when the action was performed */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the log entry */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the log entry was created */,
  "modified_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last modified the log entry */,
  "modified_date" TEXT /* Date when the log entry was last modified */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Boolean flag to indicate if the log entry is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_activity_logs_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES roles ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "role_attributes" (
  "attr_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each attribute */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the associated role */,
  "attr_name" TEXT /* Name of the attribute */,
  "attr_value" TEXT /* Value of the attribute */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the role attribute */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the role attribute was created */,
  "modified_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last modified the role attribute */,
  "modified_date" TEXT /* Date when the role attribute was last modified */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Boolean flag to indicate if the role attribute is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("attr_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_role_attributes_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES roles ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "permission_audit_logs" (
  "audit_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each audit log entry */,
  "role_perm_id" TEXT /* ID of the role-permission association being audited */,
  "action" TEXT /* Description of the change made */,
  "action_date" TEXT /* Date when the change was made */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the audit log entry */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the audit log entry was created */,
  "modified_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last modified the audit log entry */,
  "modified_date" TEXT /* Date when the audit log entry was last modified */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Boolean flag to indicate if the audit log entry is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("audit_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_permission_audit_logs_role_perm_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_perm_id") REFERENCES role_permissions ("role_perm_id")
)
